ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the applicant */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the applicant */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education achieved */,
  "nb_depend_child" INTEGER /* Number of dependent children */,
  "employ_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the applicant */,
  "yrs_current_job" INTEGER /* Years at current job */,
  "yrs_employed" INTEGER /* Total years employed */,
  "email" TEXT /* Applicant's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Applicant's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for financial records */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant's ID */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the applicant */,
  "spouse_work" TEXT /* Indicates if the spouse is working */,
  "spouse_income" REAL /* Spouse's income, if applicable */,
  "monthly_expenses" REAL /* Total monthly expenses of the applicant */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Applicant's credit score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residences" (
  "residence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for residence records */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant's ID */,
  "residential_status" TEXT /* Residential status of the applicant (e.g., tenant, owner) */,
  "yrs_current_address" INTEGER /* Years at the current address */,
  "residence_type" TEXT /* Type of residence (e.g., house, apartment) */,
  "rent_amount" REAL /* Monthly rent amount, if applicable */,
  "mortgage_amount" REAL /* Monthly mortgage amount, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("residence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residences_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant's ID */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Requested loan amount */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., debt consolidation, wedding) */,
  "loan_length" INTEGER /* Length of the loan in months */,
  "collateral" TEXT /* Type of collateral offered */,
  "writeoff" TEXT /* Indicates if the loan is written off */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan status record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan application ID */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan application (e.g., approved, denied) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date of application submission */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the decision was made */,
  "approved_amount" REAL /* Approved loan amount, if applicable */,
  "disbursal_date" TEXT /* Date of loan disbursal, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_status_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaterals" (
  "collateral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collateral record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan application ID */,
  "collateral_type" TEXT /* Type of collateral being offered */,
  "value" REAL /* Estimated value of the collateral */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collateral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collateral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaterals_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan application ID */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., reviewed, updated) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repayments" (
  "repayment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repayment record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan application ID */,
  "repayment_date" TEXT /* Date of repayment installment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Repayment installment amount */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the repayment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repayment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repayments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., loan officer, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
